title: Create siwe_nonces table SQL migration
description: Write and run the SQL migration for the siwe_nonces table, which stores single-use nonces for Sign-In With Ethereum challenges.
acceptance_criteria: Table `siwe_nonces` exists in the public schema
Column `used` is boolean, not null, default false

steps.details: CREATE INDEX idx_siwe_nonces_expires ON public.siwe_nonces(expires_at); — supports efficient deletion of expired nonces.

technical_notes: This table is only ever accessed via the service-role key inside Edge Functions. No RLS needed — client never queries it directly. Consider a cron job (pg_cron or Supabase scheduled function) to prune expired rows periodically.
